name: scanvista-monorepo
description: ScanVista — AI-Powered QR to 3D Product Visualizer Workspace

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "client,server,ai-service" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n "client,server,ai-service" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run start:client" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:ai"
